verse_text: Set a watch, O Lord, before my mouth, A door of enclosure about my lips.

links.context: This passage amplifies [[PSA.140:3]], which is sung at Vespers.
The Church teaches us to weigh our words and to pray, "Set a watch, O Lord, before my mouth" ([[PSA.140:3]]). He who lies in wait is Satan, who desires to capture our soul.
